channel.title: Life on Kenneth Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Life on Kenneth Blog

item.title: Last day of the Week!
item.description: Another boring week, but I finished building my website, that’s kinda of success? Well maybe it wasn’t that boring because I figured out how to insert an image into a post, maybe I’ll try to insert an gif someday in the future. All right seems works now. I’m starting to love this hugo blog. But I Stephen don’t know how to use algolia search in this website, it won’t show

item.title: Friday! Yeah!
item.description: Yooo! It’s Friday. The happiest day in the week must be Friday, because you’ll have two days for rest and do things whenever you like! :D But I had to take lessons during weekend, not cool, still I can working on with my blog and post some new things up to it. I just misdelated all the files that were used for deploy the blog(That’s why i didn’t post anything
